meta.description: Structured Stable Diffusion prompts for all Berserkr game characters
meta.art_style: norse fantasy, viking era, painterly style, dark fantasy, detailed character portrait, medieval scandinavian, dramatic lighting, high quality, detailed face
meta.negative_base: modern clothing, contemporary, anime, cartoon, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, signature, extra limbs, mutated hands, poorly drawn face, out of frame

characters.name: Berserkr
